description:
No spec subject — tool-managed baseline repair, no contract change.

main@a4bfd3b fails mix spec.check: api_boundary hashes for SpecLedEx.TaggedTests.build_command/2 and collect_entries/1 in .spec/realization_hashes.json still carry pre-epic values. The recommit (a4bfd3b) could not update them: Orchestrator.refresh_and_commit_hashes only runs when has_drift? is false, so drift blocks the refresh that would accept it; the seed pass only adds missing entries. Fix: delete the two stale entries and let the silent_seed pass re-add them at current values (sanctioned per specled.realized_by.silent_seed).
title: Fix stale api_boundary baseline entries for TaggedTests on main
